rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 2, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE DRYWALL, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA TRCOPAN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 2, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Metalclad's motion for summary judgment is denied. Metalclad's alternate motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issues 3 and 5 and denied as to issues 1, 2 and 4. Triable issue as to exposure Objection to the Rogers' declaration on the based on the D'Amico rule is overruled. Plaintiff concedes lack of merit of the false representation claim. No evidence to prove punitive damages. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: TED J. FOX et al VS. A.W. CHESTER COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 2, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT CUMMINS ENGINE COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Cummins' motion for summary judgment is denied. Cummins' alternate motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issues 11-15 and denied as to issues 1-10. Failure to shift burden of production as to exposure. Burden shifted and no triable facts raised as to the implied warranties, fraud/conspiracy, false representation and punitive damages claims. Enterprise liability is not a cognizable claim. =(302/HEK)
